{{Quote|Just once, I'd like to destroy a starship that ''we'' didn't pay for!|[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hurkk]] at the Battle of [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]]|<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />}}
The '''Battle of [[Oovo IV/Legends|Oovo IV]]''' took place during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces were led by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Hurkk]]. The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces included new [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigates]], ironically designed for use by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to protect convoys from Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] actions.<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />

==Behind the scenes==
Details of the battle are unavailable, as it is only mentioned within the context of the quote for the Nebulon-B Frigate's entry in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]''.<ref name="TNEGtVaV" />
